27.04.2023 Online ERASMUS+ Written Exam Important Information

Click here

for ERASMUS+ Speaking Exam Appointment List

Foreign Languages Unit English Preparatory Program (April 27) Online ERASMUS+ 2023 Written Exam Procedures and Principles

Dear Students,

ERASMUS+ 2023 Written Exam will be held online on Tuesday, April 27, 2023. The exam consists of two parts, written and speaking, our students are required to attend both exams (Written Exam and Speaking Exam).

The Written Exam will be available at

douonlineydb.dogus.edu.tr

at 11:00 am. Students are required to approve the PDP LAW INFORMATION and CONSENT TEXTS on the system before starting the exam.

All students are required to be present in their assigned Microsoft Teams classes

by 13:15

and turn on their camera and microphone. The camera and microphone will be on throughout the speaking exam. It is important for students to have a current photo and valid identity document (student identity card, TR identity document, passport, driver's license) at the exam. Students who do not have a valid identity document will not be able to participate in the exam.
